summary: Iteration 37 - Testing Homepage Pricing Section + Email Notifications. All required features verified: 5 pricing cards (Producteurs GRATUIT, Cooperatives GRATUIT, Acheteurs/Fournisseurs/RSE Sur devis with 15 jours gratuits badge), 3-step devis process section, Cooperatives updated features, Supplier trial banner, and Email notifications in MOCK mode. Backend: 11/12 tests passed (1 minor API issue). Frontend: All visual elements verified correctly.

minor.issue: Returns empty array - pricing_plans collection not seeded in DB. Frontend uses fallback mock data correctly so UI is unaffected.

action_items: Optional: Seed pricing_plans collection in DB to enable /api/pricing-plans endpoint (currently frontend uses fallback mock data)
critical_code_review_comments: PricingSection.jsx correctly displays 5 plans with proper pricing (GRATUIT for free plans, Sur devis for paid plans)
All paid plans (Acheteurs, Fournisseurs, RSE) show '15 jours gratuits' badge
Cooperatives card includes updated features: Attribution agents terrain, Fiches ICI & SSRTE integrees, Suivi completion des formulaires
3-step process section clearly explains devis workflow under pricing cards
SubscriptionBanner.jsx correctly shows trial banner with days remaining
email_service.py properly logs all email notifications in MOCK mode
quotes.py triggers email notifications on quote approve/reject and account suspend/activate
seed_data_creation: Created test user email_test_1773803002@greenlink.ci for email notification testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 37 verified: (1) Homepage pricing section with 5 cards showing correct pricing - Producteurs=GRATUIT, Cooperatives=GRATUIT, Acheteurs/Fournisseurs/RSE=Sur devis with '15 jours gratuits' badge, (2) 3-step devis workflow section visible, (3) Cooperatives features include Attribution agents terrain, Fiches ICI & SSRTE, Suivi completion, (4) Supplier dashboard shows trial banner with days remaining, (5) Email notifications are logged in MOCK mode for quote approve/reject and account suspend/activate actions. Email service uses [EMAIL-MOCK] log prefix when SMTP not configured.
mocked_api_note: Orange Money, Orange SMS, USSD Gateway, Email Service (MOCK mode - no SMTP configured) are MOCKED
